calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2017 Set For Trial On Dec-06-17 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 502

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-06-2017 Continued To Dec-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-08-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Motion to Vacate and Small Claims Appeal on the 8/15/17 Judgment

Judge: A.James Robertson, II; Clerk: Rob Goulding

Jared W. Matheson, Esq. appeared for and with defendant/Appelant Christian D'Adamo, who was placed under oath and testified. Doris D'Adamo was placed under oath and testified.

Alessandro Baruso, plaintiff / Respondent appeared in Pro Per with spouse, Carmen Spinella who was placed under oath and testified.

The Court hears argument as to Appeal on motion to vacate judgment.

In the interest of Justice, the Court also hears argument regarding the appeal Judgment, of August 15, 2017.

The Court explained if he rules to overturn the DENIED motion to Vacate, then he would make a ruling as to the Judgment on Appeal. If he sustains the DENIED Motion to Vacate, the Judgment of Aug. 15, 2017 would stand.

The Court hears further testimony.
The Court admitted into evidence demonstrative exhibits submitted by the respondent

At the conclusion of todays hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission all demonstrative exhibits were returned to the submitting party.

Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: R. Goulding ; Not reported

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-13-2017 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-15-2017 Judgment Entered
